summary: Regression after CSS-only visual upgrades (.v-label 0.82rem #F3D060 weight 500, table headers, contact-form labels) and env-var refactor of admin creds. 11/11 backend pytest cases pass; all frontend checks pass. Both admin mobiles 9929059153 and 9829312193 log in with password 2193 (env-driven). No regressions detected.

issues: (Carryover from iter_2) React DOM-prop warning: 'fetchpriority' should be camelCase 'fetchPriority' in /app/frontend/src/App.js. Cosmetic only.

tests_executed: curl POST /api/admin/login {mobile:9829312193,password:2193} -> 200 with token (PASS, env-driven multi-admin works)
Frontend /mobile-compatibility: mc-mobile placeholder == 'Enter mobile number without country Code' (PASS)
Frontend /mobile-compatibility: no Request Access button/link element on page (PASS)
Frontend /mobile-compatibility: .v-label computed style fontSize=13.12px color=rgb(243,208,96) fontWeight=500 (PASS — matches 0.82rem #F3D060 weight 500)
Frontend /mobile-compatibility: submit 1111111111 -> mc-auth-error visible with mc-admin-phone='+91 99290 59153' (PASS)
Frontend /mobile-compatibility: submit authorized 9876543210 -> mc-total-card + mc-modified + mc-pair-table with mc-row-0..mc-row-8 all 9 rows (PASS)
Frontend /admin: expand admin-add-btn, add 8877665544 -> row visible in active table (PASS)
Frontend /admin: SECOND admin login 9829312193/2193 -> dashboard renders (PASS)
Frontend /: home page .v-label computed style fontSize=13.12px color=rgb(243,208,96) fontWeight=500 (PASS)
Frontend /: contact form fill name+mobile, click 'Send on WhatsApp' -> popup to api.whatsapp.com/send/?phone=919929059153&text=... (PASS — opens WhatsApp deep-link with prefilled message)
action_items: (Cosmetic, carryover) Replace fetchpriority -> fetchPriority on hero in /app/frontend/src/App.js to silence React DOM-prop warning.

(Note) Review request mentioned 'wa.me URL'; actual implementation uses api.whatsapp.com/send/ which is functionally equivalent (both deep-link to WhatsApp). No action needed unless brand consistency requires the short wa.me form.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py admin creds are now env-driven via ADMIN_MOBILES (comma-split) and ADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD — refactor verified working for both mobiles.

(Carryover) seed_admin() still not idempotent w.r.t. password rotation — if ADMIN_DEFAULT_PASSWORD env value changes, existing admin docs keep the old bcrypt hash. Consider always upserting on startup.
(Carryover) No brute-force lockout / rate limiting on /api/admin/login — 5-fail lockout from playbook still missing.
(Carryover) JWT stored in localStorage 'ns_admin_token' (XSS exposure) — playbook prefers httpOnly cookies.
(Carryover) expires_on stored as free-form string with silent except: pass on parse — strict Pydantic date type recommended.
(Carryover) FastAPI deprecated @app.on_event('startup') — migrate to lifespan handler.
test_credentials: Admin 9929059153/2193 and 9829312193/2193 (both env-driven, both verified). Authorized client 9876543210 (seeded, verified).
seed_data_creation: Test created+removed 7011220033 (backend) and 8877665544 (frontend); both ended in 'removed' status (history tab). No active leftovers.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter_3 = full regression PASS after visual/CSS-only changes and env-var refactor of admin creds. .v-label computed style verified 13.12px (0.82rem) #F3D060 weight 500 on both /mobile-compatibility and / (Home contact form). Both admin mobiles in ADMIN_MOBILES env var login successfully. Mobile-compatibility placeholder matches new copy. Admin add/remove/history/logout flow intact. Contact form 'Send on WhatsApp' opens api.whatsapp.com/send/ deep-link with phone=919929059153 and prefilled Namaste message.
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues. Cosmetic fetchpriority React warning carryover only.
